score_evidence.completeness: All required fields present: reviewed_by, reviewed_at, ip_rights_status=clear, compliance_flags (1 advisory item), approval_status=approved_with_advisory. decision_commentary: Solid legal review. IP rights clear, one advisory flag on government payment timing (accurate and appropriate for obra pública context), proposed resolution is specific. Minor completeness gap: no explicit confirmation of public_civic clause legal review (Ley de Adquisiciones compliance). No auto-fail conditions triggered — IP section reviewed (clear), no open unresolved flags (advisory is proposed-resolved).
